title: QR Code Generator
subtitle: Create and customize QR codes instantly

input.label: Enter Text or URL
input.hint: Enter a URL, email, phone number, or any text to generate a QR code

preview.empty: Enter text or a URL above to generate your QR code

options.title: Customization Options
options.logoHint: Image will be placed at center. Error correction is set to High automatically.

whatsapp.phoneHint: Include country code (e.g. +1 for US, +52 for Mexico)
whatsapp.messagePlaceholder: Hello! I'd like to get in touch...
whatsapp.messageHint: Optional. The recipient will see this message pre-filled when they open the chat.

wifi.hiddenHint: Enable if the network does not broadcast its SSID
